text_original: What makes a great state is its being (like) a low-lying, down- flowing (stream);
text_normalized: What makes a great state is its being (like) a low-lying, down- flowing (stream);

text_original: - it becomes the centre to which tend (all the small states) under heaven.
text_normalized: - it becomes the centre to which tend (all the small states) under heaven.

text_original: (To illustrate from) the case of all females:
text_normalized: (To illustrate from) the case of all females:

text_original: - the female always overcomes the male by her stillness.
text_normalized: - the female always overcomes the male by her stillness.

text_original: Stillness may be considered (a sort of) abasement.
text_normalized: Stillness may be considered (a sort of) abasement.

text_original: Thus it is that a great state, by condescending to small states, gains them for itself;
text_normalized: Thus it is that a great state, by condescending to small states, gains them for itself;

text_original: and that small states, by abasing themselves to a great state, win it over to them.
text_normalized: and that small states, by abasing themselves to a great state, win it over to them.

text_original: In the one case the abasement leads to gaining adherents, in the other case to procuring favour.
text_normalized: In the one case the abasement leads to gaining adherents, in the other case to procuring favour.

text_original: The great state only wishes to unite men together and nourish them;
text_normalized: The great state only wishes to unite men together and nourish them;

text_original: a small state only wishes to be received by, and to serve, the other.
text_normalized: a small state only wishes to be received by, and to serve, the other.

text_original: Each gets what it desires, but the great state must learn to abase itself.
text_normalized: Each gets what it desires, but the great state must learn to abase itself.
